text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! How could I run so ungracefully?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That was in no way an exemplary performance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That was the footwork of a failing student! I'm
going full-Bakushin down the road to becoming a
delinquent!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
choice_data_list: Failure isn't necessarily a bad thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how getting back up again after being
knocked down is the key to success.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...In other words, I'm actually going full-Bakushin
on the glorious road of a model student?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! I can't back down like this! I have to get
back to training right away!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I have to set an example for everyone, so I can't
stand still for even a moment!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
choice_data_list:
You're going to set an example for everyone,
right?

You're going to set an example for everyone,
right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. It's not as if I've retired from being
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's my duty to throw my heart and soul into
leading the others until the very end!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A model student from the cradle to the grave!
That is me, Sakura Bakushin O!
